item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, we believe that collective well-being is not just secondary but central to maintaining social cohesion.

notes: Agent A starts by saying it disagrees with the statement and presents a balanced view, but by turn 5 more clearly defends collective well-being as central and accepts limits on individual actions for group protection. Agent B stays consistently rights-first. Both agents engage with each other's society-versus-rights framing. Language/script artifact: Agent A turn 3 includes Chinese-character fragments and Agent B turn 4 includes Chinese-character fragments despite both being assigned English.
